title: CLI publish UX with streamed upload and API success hardening

source.subject: feat(pckg): publish UX, streamed upload, API success hardening

body:
## Outcome

Publish UX, streamed upload, API success hardening.

## Context

- Workstream **pckg-registry** — registry and PackageDocs UI.
- Contributes to deliverable **Registry dashboard and package docs foundation** (`v02-pckg-registry-foundation`).

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `compiler`
